greeting.en: Hello! Would you like to see my wares?

poor_response.fr: Revenez quand vous aurez de l'or !
poor_response.en: Come back when you have some gold!

shop.fr: Désolé, je suis en train de déballer mes caisses. Revenez plus tard !
shop.en: Sorry, I'm currently unpacking my crates. Come back later!
